changesets.$note: Argus packages are private apps, not published npm libraries — no changeset ledger.

boundary.$note: The lockfile is pnpm-managed; legitimate dependency additions regenerate it. Allowed so normal dep changes don't trip boundary-guard.

rules.$note: Correlation is shared by SPEC_01 (scoring core), SPEC_02 (identity + unexplained productisation), and SPEC_04 (streaming correlator over ClickHouse) — touching any of those specs satisfies the rule.
SPEC_04 owns the firehose write path (Postgres→ClickHouse) and retention — changing where/how raw events are written must touch SPEC_04.
